title: genista cephalantha var. mouilleronii
intro: Genista cephalantha var. mouilleronii, also known as French broom, is a flowering shrub native to southern Europe and North Africa, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Genista cephalantha var. mouilleronii is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
